data.name: Harem Of Valerius
data.detailed_description:
藍圖


關於此遊戲

Build your empire, fight your battles, and indulge in forbidden rewards.

Harem of Valerius combines side-scroller combat, city-building strategy, and adult storytelling into a single, ambitious experience.


PLAY FREE DEMO NOW! 

You are Valerius, a disgraced Spartan warrior summoned to a divine city shrouded in mystery. Rebuild the shattered world of gods, lust, and betrayal. Rescue the lost Holy Sisters, forge alliances, and unravel a conspiracy that threatens both mortals and immortals.

🎮 Episode 3 Demo Available Now!

Key Features: 

🛡️ Dynamic Combat: Master fluid melee mechanics, powerful parries, and devastating attacks in side-scrolling action sequences. 

🏛️ Village Building: Rescue villagers, including captivating companions, and assign them roles, improving their lives and expanding your settlement. 

⚔️ Blend of Genres: Experience the perfect fusion of action-packed side scroller and thoughtful RTS gameplay. 

🌌 Epic Storytelling: Discover the secrets of the island, guided by a mystical Oracle and the relationships you forge along the way. 

🎨Intense romance scenes: Let the ancient girls give the best rewards! 


Asset Transparency : Character conversation portraits currently use AI-assisted tools.

data.short_description: Build your empire, fight your battles, and indulge in forbidden rewards.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 , AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650 , AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i9-12900K , AMD Ryzen 9 7950X
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4080, AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
